compliance-posture.title: Compliance Posture
compliance-posture.description: PRISM is designed as non-custodial, non-advisory, deterministic infrastructure.

core-operations.title: Core Operations
core-operations.description: PRISM exposes five core operations: deposit, yield accrual, credit event resolution, withdrawal, and trading.

core-protocol-layer.title: Core Protocol Layer
core-protocol-layer.description: The Core Protocol Layer is the deterministic execution engine of PRISM. It owns the vault accounting model, tranche state, NAV calculation, yield waterfall, and default resolution.

edge-case-handling.title: Edge Case Handling
edge-case-handling.description: Credit protocols need explicit behavior for edge cases. PRISM defines these cases so vault state remains deterministic and understandable.

financial-model.title: Financial Model
financial-model.description: PRISM's financial model is based on tranche assets, tranche supply, NAV, yield allocation, and loss allocation.

integrity-layer.title: Integrity Layer
integrity-layer.description: The Integrity Layer ensures correctness, verifiability, and optional privacy.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.description: PRISM stands for Programmable Risk & Income Structured Markets.

market-design.title: Market Design
market-design.description: PRISM uses constant-product AMMs to provide liquidity for tranche tokens.

risk-market-layer.title: Risk & Market Layer
risk-market-layer.description: The Risk & Market Layer provides liquidity and price discovery for PRISM credit positions.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.description: PRISM is planned in phases, beginning with the core structured credit engine and expanding into broader credit markets, automation, and institutional integrations.

security-controls.title: Security & Controls
security-controls.description: PRISM financial logic must be deterministic, transparent, and enforceable on-chain.

sourcing-layer.title: Sourcing Layer
sourcing-layer.description: The Sourcing Layer is responsible for introducing credit into PRISM.

surface-layer.title: Surface Layer
surface-layer.description: The Surface Layer is the user-facing interface for PRISM.

system-architecture.title: System Architecture
system-architecture.description: PRISM is organized into five architectural domains. Each domain has a separate responsibility so the protocol can reason cleanly about credit sourcing, deterministic accounting, market pricing, integrity, and user-facing interaction.

token-model.title: Token Model
token-model.description: Each PRISM tranche is represented by a fungible SPL token.
